gist.headline: Fresh ink on the homepage
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest community apps and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to feature the latest news and community applications.
gist.impact: Ensures visitors to the repository always see the most recent community highlights and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot and Polly the bee updating a giant pixelated book or bulletin board, representing the README.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot pinning new pixelated notes to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
